programme.title: Billy Graham Classics
programme.desc: The best-known Christian evangelist of the 20th century, Billy Graham gained world attention in 1949 with a tent revival in downtown Los Angeles that was scheduled for three weeks and lasted six. In the ensuing 55 years and more.

programme.title: A Tale of Three Letters
programme.desc: The POstables are back identifying the intended recipients of a trio of dead letters which have a surprising, personal impact on all of them. Stars Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth, Crystal Lowe, Geoff Gustafson, Rhiannon Fish.

programme.title: To the Moon and Back
programme.desc: The Postables set off on a road trip to find a talented young singer-songwriter hiding from her past. As they track her down and reunite the family, Oliver receives a box of letters from his father to help guide him.

programme.title: Helping Hands TV
programme.desc: This is the first of a three-part series at a community Op Shop, meeting the colour characters who provide a wonderful community service, and we talk about forgiveness. helpinghands.tv

programme.title: GGC Life TV

programme.title: Planetshakers TV

programme.title: LIFETV with Paul de Jong

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: Join us for the weekly church service conducted by David Jeremiah from San Diego, California, USA. Dedicated to providing sound, in-depth teaching of the Word of God verse by verse. Through his personable and expository teaching.

programme.title: In Touch 2026
programme.desc: The In Touch program reaches the world with the Gospel with messages that tackle such issues as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships. Dr. Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.desc: Tough times are inevitable in life. So how can you rejoice when circumstances are hard? In Lessons from Philippians: Unspeakable Joy, Pastor Bayless explains that true joy does not depend on whats happening around us, but on the Lord.

programme.title: Elevation Experience
programme.desc: Join Pastor Steven in the Basin where he digs deep into scripture and breaks down the Word of God in these short conversational teachings.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham

programme.title: Joel Osteen

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches dynamic messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how greatly blessed, highly favoured and deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala
programme.desc: Katherine Ruonala shares a practical message of love and hope to the nations. Reaching across denominational walls.

programme.title: Miraculous Victories of Israel

programme.title: The Mercy Ship

programme.title: What We Did On Our Holiday
programme.desc: A family of five is off to Granddad's big 75th birthday party at an uncle's estate in rural Scotland. The parents are separated and hope their three kids won't mention it. The kids love, can talk with, and will do anything for, Granddad.

programme.title: The Best Offer

programme.desc: Ricky and his family struggle with debt after the financial crash of 2008. An opportunity arrives in a shiny new van and a self-employed delivery driver franchise, but it also brings new challenges.

programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate the brutal murder of an inmate at a locked-down state mental hospital.

programme.desc: The CSI teams come together to save one of their own when they learn one team member has been kidnapped and buried alive, and now they must find him before he suffocates under 5 feet of dirt.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Reunited, the team pieces together the cause of a mysterious explosion at a trailer park, how a stripper ended dead in a street wearing a shopping bag, and how two bodies turned into soup in a trunk.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The pursuit of the American dream leaves a movie star and several immigrant laundry workers dead, in a dark upstairs-downstairs look at the glitter and grime of Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSI team investigates the death of a woman found dead on the staircase in her suburban home. Suspicion quickly falls on the victim's husband, but the blood spatter evidence tells a different story.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: An intruder with a jones for junk food breaks into a residence while a dead body is dumped in the backyard, leading the CSIs to investigate a cult.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Nick, Warrick, Sara and Greg are sent to eastern Nevada to investigate the disappearance of an entire family.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A single mother is found dead in her home, the apparent victim of suicide. When the evidence points to murder, the team delves into the mysterious past of the woman and her baby.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A routine traffic stop turns into a shoot-out through the streets of Vegas, leaving a string of dead bodies including a rookie cop.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Captain Brass and Detective Curtis are haunted by the death of a rookie cop as Grissom and his CSI team continues to investigate the case of a routine traffic stop turned mile-long shoot-out.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A body found in a restaurant dumpster leads Catherine and Brass into the world of competitive eating.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A mother reports her son missing and the investigation quickly focuses on a suspicious man seen in the park. But what appears to be is not, and Catherine finds herself face-to-face with a modern day Medea.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Werewolf in Vegas. The CSIs investigate the killing of a man afflicted with Hypertrichosis, a.k.a. human werewolf syndrome.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a waiter is gunned down at a glitzy Vegas party, the CSIs postulate that the waiter was trying to murder the hostess, an aging Vegas dancer and socialite. Several suspects are under the microscope.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs track down an ex-con who lets his lifetime of crime catch up with him when he tries to settle an old score, accidentally killing an innocent young girl and destroying the new life he had built.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When Lady Heather's daughter is found dead, Grissom and the CSI team are led into a twisted world of medical experimentation conducted by a crazed, Nazi-sympathising pseudo-scientist.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A romantic evening ends abruptly when a dead body is found in the chimney of an ageing bachelor's house. Sara, Nick and Brass are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: A young woman is found drugged and sexually assaulted in the hallway of her high-rise apartment building. The CSIs try to nail the psychotic criminal who appears to have a passion for pedicures.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Greg investigate a wildfire that killed one man and badly burned a woman. Catherine, Nick, and Warrick get the case of a family of three murdered in their home.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When a psychic is murdered at her occult shop, Grissom, Greg and Warrick examine the excessive amount of clues. They soon realize that the psychics ability to see into the future could be the cause of her own death.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: When three teenagers are shot to death, when trying to put up posters of their favourite rapper, the team is drawn into the world of hip-hop street gangs and all the violence that goes along with it.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: The CSIs experience the wedding jitters when they investigate a case in which the mother of the groom is found dead, and tied to the couple's car by her pantyhose.

programme.desc: When the assistant of a Hollywood entertainment mogul is murdered during his vacation in Vegas, the CSIs question how the young victim could afford to drive a Ferrari and lodge at a fancy hotel.

programme.desc: When the team finds a woman shot to death in her home, shortly after sleeping with her sexy teenage gardener, the victim's husband reigns as the number one suspect.

programme.desc: While Brass struggles for his life after being shot in the chest, the team investigates the murders of a decapitated victim with a civil war obsession, and a man who killed himself by partying too hard.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter
programme.desc: It's New Year's Eve weekend, and in the midst of the revelry, Miguel Mendez is beaten to death outside a convenience store. Lt. Joe Kenda faces a challenging investigation.

programme.title: Homicide Hunter

programme.title: The Murder Next Door
programme.desc: When a body is found in woodlands, local residents in the rural village react with shock that there's a killer in their midst. Eighteen months on, a man is serving life for double murder, but a mystery remains - where is the other body?

programme.title: Evidence Of A Killer

programme.title: The First 48

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A suspect denies ownership of his pants and his drugs. Police bust a prostitute barely of age. An ex-convict is caught with drugs. A bar patron tries to slip a mysterious substance into drinks.

programme.desc: A bicyclist tries to outrun the police. A prostitute claims to be going to dinner at 2 AM. A meth addict claims he's being chased. A bad parking job gets two drug suspects busted.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot and Hastings meet Miss Nick Buckley, who lives near their hotel at End House, and she tells Poirot she has had three near-fatal accidents in a few weeks.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: While creating a memorial garden and helping to solve a murder, Laura tries to repair her relationship with her estranged daughter following her divorce.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Marple investigates when Father Gorman is murdered after visiting dying Mrs Davis, leading her to London to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Hustle
programme.sub-title: And This Little Piggy Had Money
programme.desc: A motley group of London con artists pulls off a series of daring and intricate stings.

programme.title: The Coroner
programme.desc: Jane is reconnected with an old friend when she tries to find out who left a girl to die.

programme.title: The Royal
programme.desc: A siege takes place during a girls' trip onboard a pirate radio ship; a leader recovers from a stroke.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Vera is called to the scene of a murdered support worker who is found hidden among the bleak woodlands of Northumberland National Park. Was this an attack of opportunity or a carefully planned ambush?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot hunts an art thief at a snowbound Swiss Alps hotel where layered mysteries emerge and a familiar face from the past returns.

programme.title: Hustle

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot
programme.desc: Poirot becomes a criminal himself when he agrees to help a beautiful woman recover a letter written in her youth that is being used to blackmail her.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: While on assignment to restore an old garden on the French Riviera, Rosemary and Laura find time to solve another murder.

programme.title: Mr. Bean
programme.desc: Mr Bean comes to the aid of a heart attack victim, with awful results. He fails miserably to post a letter, but after various mishaps, he happily flies off on his holidays.

programme.title: Baptiste
programme.desc: Natalie reveals the full shocking truth about Edward and Julien has to tread carefully.

programme.desc: The body of a young man is discovered face down in a river by Thrunton Woods. But tracing the victim's identity proves difficult for Vera and her team.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's best friend George is obsessed with finding a way to break up with his overbearing girlfriend. However, after dispensing his sage advice on the topic, Jerry finds himself in a similar agonizing position with the same woman.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Seinfeld stars Jerry Seinfeld as a stand-up comedian whose life in New York City is made even more chaotic by his quirky group of friends who join him in wrestling with life's most perplexing, yet often trivial questions.

programme.desc: Seinfeld stars Jerry Seinfeld as a stand-up comedian whose life in New York City is made even more chaotic by his quirky group of friends who join him in wrestling with life's most perplexing, yet often trivial questions.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: After mustering enough courage to call a girl for a second date, George repeatedly gets her answering machine then blurts out a nasty message. Regretting it later, he talks Jerry into helping get rid of the message before it can be heard.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When the apartment above his becomes vacant, Jerry convinces the apartment managers to give it to Elaine. However, realizing she will be able to track his every move, Jerry has second thoughts about having Elaine as a neighbour.

programme.desc: When Jerry's apartment is broken into, George persuades him to look at a new one. But the decision to move sets off an unhappy chain of events as Elaine wants to rent Jerry's old place, and George really wants his new one.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Seinfeld stars Jerry Seinfeld as a stand-up comedian whose life in New York City is made even more chaotic by his quirky group of friends who join him in wrestling with life's most perplexing, yet often trivial questions.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry meets Keith Hernandez and wants to make a good impression, but Keith breaks a date with him to make one with Elaine instead. George attempts to extend his unemployment benefits.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry becomes increasingly jealous of Elaine's relationship with Keith Hernandez. The unemployed George Constanza schemes to collect unemployment checks, while the illustrated JFK "second spitter theory" is further investigated.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When George's car breaks down at the airport, Jerry coolly convinces a waiting limo driver that they are his intended passengers.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry witnesses a hit-and-run and tracks down the driver, but his good intentions get sidetracked when he discovers she's a beautiful woman willing to go out with him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry's new girlfriend gives his friends Elaine, George and Kramer prime VIP seats to a Yankees baseball game. But when the trio is tossed out for a minor altercation, Jerry backs up his friends and calls it quits with the woman.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Jerry settles in to watch a boxing match on TV, George and Elaine return with his borrowed car and concoct a wild story to explain why it's developed a clanking noise.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When Kramer invites himself over once too often, Jerry demands he return the spare set of keys Jerry loaned to him, which virtually ends their open-door friendship. Distraught and overwrought, Kramer heads west to California.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: With Elaine in Europe, Jerry asks George to accompany him on a trip to LA and The Tonight Show, while there they will try to locate Kramer. Stars Jerry Seinfeld, Julia Louis-Dreyfus, Jason Alexander and Michael Richards.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and George try to contact the police to tell them Kramer is innocent. Kramer still doesn't know he's a wanted man.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: NBC executives ask Jerry to come up with an idea for a TV series. George decides he can be a writer and comes up with a show about "nothing".

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: NBC gives Jerry and George another meeting and on the way, Jerry throws out a watch his parents gave him. Also, Kramer suffers side effects from head injury.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry must be at his most creative when he has to explain to his visiting parents why he isn't wearing the watch they once gave him.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A sweaty-palmed George tracks down a TV executive to negotiate his series deal - at a lower figure.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry agrees to make a side trip to visit a sickly fan, who must live in a protective plastic tent, while he and George drive up to a mountain cabin with their dates. But complications set in when Jerry gets lost while driving with Elaine.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As George and Jerry start their script, George confronts Susan's father about the cabin fire.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A simple night turns into a nightmare when Jerry meets Elaine at the opera, unaware that her new boyfriend is "Crazy Joe Davola".

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry and George strain to think of an idea for a TV series only hours before meeting with network honchos. But Jerry can't forget about his date who is still a virgin.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Jerry challenges George, Kramer and Elaine to pool their money in a contest of self-denial. Meanwhile, an excited Elaine looks forward to her date with John Kennedy Jr.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: On a flight home, Jerry parties in first class with a beautiful woman while Elaine suffers in a cramped coach seat next to a fat man.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Elaine is mortified when she accidentally reveals a bit too much decolletage on her Christmas card, which she has sent to everyone she knows.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: A comedy of errors kicks in when Jerry is frustrated in his attempts to squeeze in two comedy appearances on opposite sides of town while shadowed by a pesky fellow comedian.

programme.desc: When George's car breaks down at the airport, Jerry coolly convinces a waiting limo driver that they are his intended passengers.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: NBC executives ask Jerry to come up with an idea for a TV series. George decides he can be a writer and comes up with a show about "nothing".

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: NBC gives Jerry and George another meeting and on the way, Jerry throws out a watch his parents gave him. Also, Kramer suffers side effects from head injury.

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: As Elaine proudly announces her new promotion, George concludes that all of his instincts in life have been wrong. Deciding to try something different, he changes his regular lunch order.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: While on the way to a soup stand whose demanding proprietor's harsh rules have led to him being referred to as "The Soup Nazi," Elaine stops to buy a sidewalk vendor's antique armoire.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: When an eavesdropping college reporter mistakenly prints that Jerry and George are intimate long-time companions, Jerry vainly works overtime to prove his straightness.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: Romance starts to blossom between George and his former college classmate Diane, after Jerry falsely tells her that George is a successful marine biologist.

programme.title: Seinfeld

programme.desc: While abstinence makes George smarter, it has the opposite effect on Elaine. Kramer opens a smoker's lounge in his apartment as Jerry prepares to speak at a junior high school.

programme.desc: Seinfeld stars Jerry Seinfeld as a stand-up comedian whose life in New York City is made even more chaotic by his quirky group of friends who join him in wrestling with life's most perplexing, yet often trivial questions.

programme.desc: Elaine's new boyfriend uses one of Jerry's intimate secrets. George's mum gets an eye job.

programme.title: Seinfeld
programme.desc: George builds a bed under his desk. Elaine gets a mattress from her back conscious boyfriend. Jerry wrangles an indecisive carpenter, and Kramer takes extreme measures to swim.

programme.desc: We focus on moyashi, or bean sprouts. They may not look like much, but they're packed with vitamins and minerals. They're easy to use, and most importantly, affordable. This lends to their popularity.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: A timely presentation of the daily news in Japan and abroad, featuring up-to-the-minute national and international events that have shaped the day's events, items of interest in the Japanese community, special events and the sports scores.

programme.title: YOKAI
programme.desc: The yokai Ubume was said to be a ghostly woman appearing at night, asking passersby to hold her child under threat of death. We examine how this terrifying figure came to be seen as a sympathetic one.

programme.title: Hit the Road 5min
programme.desc: One of the most appealing features of Japan's national road network is the various Michinoeki, literally way stations, that provide a place for motorists to rest, dine and shop.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: Centuries ago, Tokyo was known as EDO. More than a million people enjoyed life in this city, they live on in ukiyo-e woodblock prints. Take a deep dive into ukiyo-e and explore the soul of old Tokyo.

programme.title: CINEMATIC JOURNEY
programme.desc: Kyle Card hikes along the 1000km trail following the Pacific Coast in northern Japan where he discovers local lifestyles, stunning nature, traces of the area's 2011 disaster, and resilient people.

programme.title: Ukiyoe EDO-LIFE
programme.desc: A series of doodles by the famous artist Utagawa Kuniyoshi turn out to be carefully considered depictions of the kabuki actors of the day. What kind of artistic statement was he trying to make?

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: A timely presentation of the daily news in Japan and abroad, featuring up-to-the-minute national and international events that have shaped the day's events, items of interest in the Japanese community, special events and the sports scores.

programme.title: Design X Stories
programme.desc: Today's theme: Vanishing Tools. As the rising age of artisans puts the survival of certain crafts at risk, we shine a light on the vanishing tools used to keep them alive, and their anonymous designs.

programme.title: Story Land in Classical Japanese
programme.desc: This program presents masterpieces of classical Japanese literature in both their original forms and modern translations, with easy-to-understand imagery that conveys the worldview of ancient Japan.

programme.title: Mitateru-phose: Let's Change Perspect...
programme.desc: This program employs "mitateru," a Japanese technique, to inspire children's imagination by encouraging them to view objects differently and develop their unique perspectives and creativity.

programme.title: Nun's Seasonal Calendar
programme.desc: In this episode, we learn about the summer dates of shousho and taisho. The temple chefs teach us how to make two seasonal specialties: somen noodle rolls and marinated summer vegetables.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: A timely presentation of the daily news in Japan and abroad, featuring up-to-the-minute national and international events that have shaped the day's events, items of interest in the Japanese community, special events and the sports scores.

programme.title: GRAND SUMO Legends
programme.desc: GRAND SUMO Legends sheds new light on many great rikishi who shaped sumo history ... their techniques, records, fights and even foreign challengers. Discover new attractions of GRAND SUMO through NHK archive footage.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: A timely presentation of the daily news in Japan and abroad, featuring up-to-the-minute national and international events that have shaped the day's events, items of interest in the Japanese community, special events and the sports scores.

programme.title: J-MELO
programme.desc: Japan's exciting music scene! Pop, rock, traditional, and more! Live performances, artist interviews, plus all the latest news.

programme.title: Little Charo
programme.desc: Little Charo is an animation series about a Japanese dog who got lost in NY. "I want to see my owner again!" Charo starts his adventure back home. Season 1-14.

programme.title: Japanology Plus mini
programme.desc: In construction, heavy machinery is indispensable. We look at all kinds of machines, from small excavators to tower cranes for high-rise buildings, and even cutting-edge remote operation systems.

programme.title: A Cat's-Eye View of Japan
programme.sub-title: Shiga: Carefree in a Castle Town
programme.desc: Nyan lives in a porcelain workshop near Hikone Castle. He stays near his beloved owner during work time. Kuro lives at a temple that she patrols daily. She strikes a dramatic pose during her nap.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: A timely presentation of the daily news in Japan and abroad, featuring up-to-the-minute national and international events that have shaped the day's events, items of interest in the Japanese community, special events and the sports scores.

programme.title: CYCLE AROUND JAPAN Highlights
programme.desc: On the islands and coast of the Yamaguchi end of the Seto Inland Sea, we experience a warm welcome in these hard-working small communities, poor in amenities but rich in happiness and human kindness.

programme.title: The Wakey Show
programme.desc: This episode features "Wakey's Door" on the Japanese school backpack randoseru,"Mind and Body Exercise" to move and feel refreshed, and a Comedy Writers skit,"I Lose Things." It energizes kids.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: A timely presentation of the daily news in Japan and abroad, featuring up-to-the-minute national and international events that have shaped the day's events, items of interest in the Japanese community, special events and the sports scores.

programme.title: Somewhere Street
programme.desc: Sentier, once a bustling garment district, is now home to many Internet start-ups and hosts new restaurants, galleries and boutiques, making it a dynamic hub for trendsetting businesses in Paris.

programme.title: The seasons of Yamato
programme.desc: A series of poetic videos by Koichi Hozan, a videographer living in Nara, in collaboration with a pianist, Mine Kawakami, for which she plays exclusive pieces, makes you experience each seasons.

programme.title: NHK NEWSLINE
programme.desc: A timely presentation of the daily news in Japan and abroad, featuring up-to-the-minute national and international events that have shaped the day's events, items of interest in the Japanese community, special events and the sports scores.

programme.title: RAMEN JAPAN
programme.desc: A unique ramen loaded with fresh local vegetables! Savor a premium bowl packed with rich chicken flavor.

programme.title: Core Kyoto mini
programme.sub-title: Gift Giving: The significance of auspicious decorations
programme.desc: Gifts are exchanged in the traditional betrothal rite. Paper cords are twisted into intricate shapes and decorate gifts.

programme.sub-title: Cheering up a junior employee who is feeling down
programme.desc: Today: cheering up a junior employee who is feeling down. Nyamjav Baljinnyam, from Mongolia, works at a car maintenance company. He takes on a roleplay challenge to help improve his Japanese skills.

programme.title: Zero Waste Life
programme.desc: Taoda Ayane does amazing things with milk cartons, transforming them into accessories, bags, and even clothing. The cartons are also strong and water-resistant, so her creations are practical, too.

programme.title: Infernal Affairs III
programme.desc: In Hong Kong, months after the first film, Ming suspects a superintendent is a triad mole, while years earlier, Yan undertakes his first mission. (Subtitles).

programme.title: Showgirls
programme.desc: Nomi Malone has what it takes to make it as a Las Vegas showgirl - what she doesn't have is a way in. To survive, she accepts the only job available, lap dancing at a seedy club.

programme.title: God Is A Bullet
programme.desc: After his ex-wife is murdered and his daughter is kidnapped by a cult, Bob Hightower, infiltrates the group to hunt down their leader with the help of the cult's only female victim escapee.

programme.title: Black Death
programme.desc: Set during the time of the first outbreak of bubonic plague in England, a young monk is given the task of learning the truth about reports of people being brought back to life in a small village.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 1
programme.desc: Based on the true story of an Illinois detective's quest to bring convicted serial killer John Wayne Gacy to justice.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, the star pupil of a recently-deceased martial arts teacher battles a Japanese dojo which seeks the demise of his master's fighting school.

programme.title: You Were Never Really Here
programme.desc: Joe (Joaquin Phoenix) is a hired gun who rescues trafficked girls, using brutal methods against those responsible.

programme.title: I Spit On Your Grave
programme.desc: An aspiring writer is repeatedly sexually abused, humiliated, and left for dead by four men whom she systematically hunts down to seek revenge, inflicting upon them every horrifying and torturous moment they carried out on her.

programme.title: Cops Vs Thugs
programme.desc: A dirty cop is forced to choose between the police and his yakuza buddies when a new boss arrives in his precinct.

programme.title: Hokuriku Proxy War
programme.desc: A Yakuza group from Osaka with dreams of national dominance moves into the snowy Hokuriku region, sparking a bloody turf war with local gangs.

programme.title: Timecrimes
programme.desc: A man accidentally gets into a time machine and travels back in time nearly an hour. Finding himself will be the first of a series of disasters of unforeseeable consequences.

programme.title: Joint Security Area
programme.desc: After a shooting incident at the North-South Korean border DMZ leaves two North Korean soldiers dead, a neutral Swiss and Swedish team investigates what actually happened.

programme.title: Thesis (Tesis)
programme.desc: A Spanish film student (Ana Torrent) finds a videotape showing the torture and murder of a missing coed.

programme.title: Jungle
programme.desc: An enthusiastic young adventurer follows his dreams into the Amazon jungle with two friends and a guide with a mysterious past.

programme.title: Fist of Fury
programme.desc: During the Japanese occupation of Shanghai, the star pupil of a recently-deceased martial arts teacher battles a Japanese dojo which seeks the demise of his master's fighting school.

programme.title: G.I. Samurai
programme.desc: A squadron of Japanese Self-Defence Force soldiers find themselves transported through time to their country's warring states era, when rival samurai clans were battling to become the supreme Shogun.

programme.title: Black Robe
programme.desc: In 1634 a Jesuit missionary sets out to convert the tribes in Huron Indian country. A culture-clashing masterpiece from Australian director Bruce Beresford.

programme.title: To Catch A Killer: Part 2
programme.desc: Part 2. After achieving two search warrants, Kozenczak finds a large amount of incriminating evidence, and later 29 bodies buried throughout John Gacy's property.

programme.title: Hobo With a Shotgun
programme.desc: Hoping for heaven but finding an urban hell, a homeless man takes aim at a crime boss and the man's sadistic sons.

programme.title: You Don't Nomi: Verhoeven's Showgirls
programme.desc: Trace Paul Verhoeven's Showgirls (1995) redemptive journey from notorious flop to cult classic, and maybe even masterpiece.

programme.title: Quest For Fire
programme.desc: A prehistoric Cro-Magnon tribe depends on an ever-burning source of fire, which eventually extinguishes. Lacking the knowledge of how to start a new one, the tribe sends three warriors on a quest.

programme.title: Color Out Of Space
programme.desc: A family's retreat to rural life quickly crumbles when a meteorite crashes into their front yard. They attempt to battle a nebulous entity that they can barely understand.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: As the seconds tick down to midnight, an ex-con becomes a reluctant hero trapped by a masked "Collector" in a maze of lethal invention while trying to rescue the very family he came to rob.

programme.title: The Collection
programme.desc: After being celebrated for escaping from "The Collector", an infamous serial killer who makes it impossible for anyone to get away alive, a man is forced to get into a booby-trapped warehouse to save an innocent woman from the murderer.

programme.title: Top Knot Detective
programme.desc: Takashi Takamoto begins writing jingles for a well-known Japanese company and ends up creating a bloody series of samurai action that, over time, becomes a cult series.

programme.title: The Stunt Man
programme.desc: A fugitive stumbles onto a movie set just when they need a new stunt man, takes the job as a way to hide out and falls for the leading lady while facing off with his manipulative director.

programme.title: Crabs!
programme.desc: In the middle of prom night, a swarm of murderous crabs descends upon a small coastal town.

programme.title: Wrong Place
programme.desc: A meth producer tracks down a former police chief to silence him before he can testify, but soon finds himself facing more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Hobo With a Shotgun
programme.desc: Hoping for heaven but finding an urban hell, a homeless man takes aim at a crime boss and the man's sadistic sons.

programme.title: Corrective Measures
programme.desc: When a powerless new inmate arrives at a prison for supervillains, he must choose his friends wisely, or become a pawn in the deadly game between the Warden and the world's greatest criminal mastermind, The Lobe.

programme.title: Coming Home In The Dark
programme.desc: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

programme.title: Audition
programme.desc: A widower accepts his friend's offer to audition girls in order to search for his new wife. However, the girl he likes does not appear to be the one she claims to be.

programme.title: Raw (Grave)
programme.desc: A young woman, studying to be a vet, develops a craving for human flesh.

programme.title: I Saw The Devil
programme.desc: The line between good and evil begins to blur when a special agent goes on the hunt for a serial killer who brutally murdered his pregnant fiancee.

programme.title: Society
programme.desc: A Beverly Hills teen discovers his parents are part of a gruesome orgy cult for the social elite.

programme.title: Night Of The Living Dead (1968)
programme.desc: The radiation from a fallen satellite causes the recently deceased to rise from the grave and seek the living to use as food.

programme.title: Day Of The Dead
programme.desc: The flesh-eating undead have wiped out every last vestige of the civilised world. Deep underground, a group of scientists and soldiers work to find a cure for the unstoppable plague.

programme.title: The Wind
programme.desc: Lizzy is settling a remote stretch of land on the 19th-century American frontier, when she begins to sense a sinister presence that seems to be borne of the land itself.

programme.title: The Science Of Sleep
programme.desc: A man entranced by his dreams and imagination is love-struck with a French woman and feels he can show her his world.

programme.title: Abre Los Ojos
programme.desc: A very handsome gentleman finds the love of his life, but suffers an accident and needs to have his face reconstructed through surgery after being severely disfigured.

programme.title: The Fall
programme.desc: In silent-era Hollywood, stuntman Roy Walker is taken to hospital after an on-set accident. He befriends a young girl and tells her a fantastical tale of heroes avenging an evil ruler.

programme.title: Raw (Grave)
programme.desc: A young woman, studying to be a vet, develops a craving for human flesh.

programme.title: The Thicket
programme.desc: A tough bounty hunter is hired to find a ruthless killer and recruits an unlikely group for a dangerous journey into a deadly wilderness.

programme.title: Super Mario Bros.
programme.desc: Two Brooklyn plumbers, Mario and Luigi, must travel to another dimension to rescue a princess from the evil dictator King Koopa and stop him from taking over the world.

programme.title: Vivarium
programme.desc: A young couple looking for the perfect home find themselves trapped in a mysterious labyrinth-like neighbourhood of identical houses.

programme.title: Police Story
programme.desc: A kung-fu policeman (Jackie Chan) must protect a female witness (Brigitte Lin) from a Hong Kong drug lord for whom she used to work.

programme.title: Police Story 2
programme.desc: A Hong Kong cop's unusual policing methods result in his demotion to traffic duty, despite his success in fighting crime. Meanwhile, an old enemy is released from prison and sets out to get revenge.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey
programme.desc: After Christopher Robin abandons them for college, Pooh and Piglet embark on a bloody rampage as they search for a new source of food.

programme.title: Winnie The Pooh: Blood And Honey 2
programme.desc: Not wanting to live in the shadows any longer, Winnie-the-Pooh, Piglet, Owl and Tigger take their fight to the town of Ashdown, leaving a bloody trail of death and mayhem in their wake.

programme.title: Noroi: The Curse
programme.desc: A paranormal journalist named Kobayashi goes missing shortly after completing a documentary. What begins as an investigation into strange noises soon evolves into the chilling mystery of a demonic entity.

programme.title: Doll Man Vs Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Judith Grey teams with Brick Bardo (Dollman) and his girlfriend Ginger to face the evil Demonic Toys for one final battle.

programme.title: Good Boy
programme.desc: Christian, a millionaire heir, meets Sigrid, a young student, on a dating app. They hit it off, but there's only one problem: Christian lives with Frank, a man who dresses up and constantly acts like a dog.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles (1990)
programme.desc: From their base in the city sewers, turtle heroes Michelangelo, Raphael, Leonardo and Donatello are on a mission to defeat an evil warlord and wipe out crime.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II
programme.desc: The heroes of the half-shell are back! Our fearsome foursome go after the glowing canister that has slipped into the hands of the evil Shredder and his mutant allies, Rahzar and Tokka.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III
programme.desc: When a magic sceptre accidentally transports April back through time to 17th Century Japan, the boys take off in hot pursuit, cowabungling their way right out of the sewers.

programme.title: Arctic
programme.desc: Sole-survivor of a plane crash, and stranded deep within the Arctic Circle, Overgard is waiting to be rescued, when a sudden turn of events finds him no longer on his own.

programme.title: The Hitcher
programme.desc: A young man who escapes the clutches of a murderous hitchhiker is subsequently stalked by the hitcher and framed for his crimes.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A story told both forwards and backwards in time about an ex- insurance investigator, unable to remember new thoughts, who uses notes and tattoos to hunt for the man he thinks killed his wife.

programme.title: Pulse
programme.desc: An employee of a floral shop hangs himself when a colleague goes to his apartment to investigate his absence from work.

programme.title: The Cure
programme.desc: A frustrated detective deals with the case of several gruesome murders committed by people who have no recollection of what they've done.

programme.title: House Of The Devil
programme.desc: Financially struggling college student Samantha takes a strange babysitting job that coincides with a full lunar eclipse. She slowly realizes her clients harbor a terrifying secret.

programme.title: Texas Chainsaw Massacre
programme.desc: Teenagers are tortured, chopped up and impaled on meat hooks by a demented backwards family. This grisly 1974 blood-curdler ranks with Psycho and Halloween as a landmark in the horror/slasher genre.

programme.title: Demonic Toys
programme.desc: Two gunrunners and a pregnant policewoman (Tracy Scoggins) are trapped in a warehouse with a bad boy's toys.

programme.title: Sound Of Silence
programme.desc: Emma must uncover the dark secret behind a cursed radio to survive and protect her family.

programme.title: Border Security: America's Front Line
programme.desc: A Canadian is interviewed after officers find pictures of pot plants on his phone; a canine team detects marijuana on a couple.

programme.title: Border Security: Australia's Front Line
programme.desc: Authorities are concerned about an erratic Chilean woman, whom they suspect is trafficking drugs. A Malaysian man's bags test positive for traces of narcotics.

programme.title: Police Ten 7
programme.desc: In New Zealand, the term 'Police Ten 7' means 'Police have arrived on the scene'. This unique fly-on-the-wall reality series brims with action as it follows urban cops on the beat.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: When the occupants of a car cruising past them start acting oddly, officers decide to take a closer look. But the car takes off from them and from there, the police chase develops into a manhunt.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Featuring police officers in cities across the US, patrolling streets for car thieves, drug pushers, sex-trade workers, violent thugs and anyone else who dares step onto the wrong side of the law.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An alleged burglar claims a sack of money is a gift from grandma. A pink bandana leads deputies to question a suspect's story. A deputy tries to calm a man after a heated argument with his wife.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: Officers respond to a report of two drunk and destructive boys. A woman is arrested in an assault call. A vandalism victim insists that the suspect be let go. A beer run goes horribly wrong.

programme.title: Cops Reloaded
programme.desc: A high speed pursuit results in a car wreck. Officers make an arrest in a familial domestic dispute. An evicted tenant attempts to recover her belongings. A teen calls his mom during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Police Interceptors

programme.title: Surgeons: A Matter Of Life Or Death
programme.desc: Alfie, 17, needs urgent surgery for a rare facial tumour. Elizabeth's kidneys have grown to watermelon size & must be removed. Simon's skull crumbles after radiotherapy.

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: The air ambulance teams struggle to get to a horse-rider, who has badly injured her ankle, in a forest in Norfolk; Steph is trapped with multiple injuries after a bad smash in Northumberland.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie are thrown together in marriage, but as their emotional and physical relationship unfolds, deeper feelings arise. Claire is ultimately torn between two men in two very different times.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Frank desperately searches for his missing wife, while Claire tries to come to terms with her new marriage. Claire is faced with an emotional quandary as a life-altering opportunity presents itself.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie and the Highlanders rescue Claire from Black Jack Randall. Back at the castle, politics threaten to tear Clan MacKenzie apart and Jamie's scorned lover, Laoghaire, attempts to win him back.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.sub-title: By The Pricking Of My Thumbs
programme.desc: Jamie hopes the newly arrived Duke of Sandringham will help lift the price from his head, while Claire attempts to save an abandoned child.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Geillis are on trial for witchcraft, while Jamie manages to rescue Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Reunited, Claire and Jamie make their way to Lallybroch, Jamie's family home.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie finds himself between a rock and a hard place when a redcoat deserter from his past resurfaces.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jenny set out to rescue Jaime from his redcoat captors. However, when Murtagh joins up, they turn to unorthodox tactics to send word to Jaime.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jaime awaits his death sentence at Wentworth Prison, while Claire and the Highlanders search for a rescue plan.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: A desperate plan manages to free Jaime, but his wounds are more than just physical. At a nearby monastery, Claire attempts to save both Jamie's heart and soul, as his mind lingers on the torture.

programme.desc: Claire and Jamie throw an elaborate dinner party intended to derail investors in Prince Charles' war effort. Meanwhile, Claire reveals to Jamie that Jack Randall is alive.

programme.desc: Reunited, Jamie and Claire attempt to extinguish the fires their dinner party ignited but their relationship is put to the ultimate test when the past rears its ugly head.

programme.desc: Jamie and Claire devise a scheme to stop a wine deal which could fill the Prince's war chest. When Claire learns Jamie has gone back on his word, the couple are met with dire consequences.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Trusting in Claire's knowledge of history, Jamie leads the Jacobite army into a critical battle with British opposition near the town of Preston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and the Highlanders are sent north after the Jacobite leaders decide to halt their march on London. A band of redcoats makes trouble for the Scots, leading to a most unexpected reunion for Claire.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: As Jamie puts all of his efforts into turning the Jacobite army away from the impending slaughter at Culloden Moor, Claire attempts to comfort the sick Alex Randall.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Flashing forward to 1968, Claire reveals the truth about her parentage to her daughter. Back in the 18th century, the day of the Battle of Culloden has arrived.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After living through the Battle of Culloden, Jamie is at the mercy of British victors, until his past provides his only hope of survival. Meanwhile, Claire attempts to adjust to life in 1940s Boston.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Jamie leads a lonely life until Lallybroch is threatened by redcoats pursing the elusive Jacobite traitor. In Boston, Claire and Frank struggle to co-exist in a marriage haunted by the ghost of Jamie.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: In prison, Jamie discovers that an old foe has become the warden and has the power to make his life hell. Claire and Frank both put their best foot forward in marriage, but an uninvited guest shatters the illusion.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: While serving as a groomsman at Helwater, Jamie is pulled into the intrigue of a British family. In 1968, Claire, Brianna and Roger struggle to trace Jamie's whereabouts, leaving Claire to wonder if they will ever find him.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Brianna grapples with life-changing revelations and Claire must help her come to terms with the fact that she is her father's daughter. Roger brings news that forces Claire and Brianna to face an impossible choice.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After decades apart, Jamie and Claire finally reunite and rekindle their emotional and physical bonds. But Jamie's new business dealings jeopardize the couples' hopes for a simple life together.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire follows her conscience as a surgeon, even though it could put her and Jamie's lives at risk. Jamie attempts to evade the reach of the Crown as its representative closes in on his illegal dealings.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire returns to Lallybroch with Jamie, where she does not receive quite the reception she was expecting. Unbeknown to her, Jamie's made some choices in their time apart which come back to haunt them.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire and Jamie leave Scotland, sailing to the West Indies on an urgent quest. When the superstitious crew looks for someone to blame after a string of bad luck, rescue comes from an unlikely source.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire races to discover the source of an epidemic aboard a disease-stricken ship before hundreds of sailors die. And as Jamie locks horns with Captain Raines, Fergus finds himself torn between loyalty and love.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: After making a leap of faith, Claire washes up on an island where survival is her only option. Navigating treacherous waters crippled the Artemis, so Jamie devises a joyful moment for his crew in the midst of setbacks.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: The Artemis finally reaches Jamaica bringing Jamie and Claire much closer to their goal. During a ball on the island, the Frasers encounter old allies, as well as former adversaries who threaten to derail their mission.

programme.title: Outlander
programme.desc: Claire is forced to play a game of cat and mouse with an old adversary as she searches for Young Ian. The Frasers race through the jungles of Jamaica to prevent the unthinkable.

programme.desc: Claire's medical expertise proves invaluable, but she begins to fear for her life when tragedy strikes her patients' household. Jamie and Young Ian travel to a nearby town to recruit settlers for Fraser's Ridge.

programme.title: Absolutely Fabulous
programme.desc: Harrods have stopped delivering and Saffy's sent Patsy and Edina off to the supermarket - whatever that is. Things are at crisis point - Eddie's going to be poor!

programme.title: Qi
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig uncovers a stash of secrets with Alan Davies, James Acaster, Daliso Chaponda and Cariad Lloyd.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob Brydon hosts the comedy panel show. Joining team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack are Dion Dublin, Debbie McGee, Bob Mortimer and Lucy Porter.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Nine years after the suicide of Ferdy Villiers his family and guests gather to celebrate the festive season. However, not everyone is imbued with the Christmas spirit.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Penhale and Morwenna participate in the annual gig race against another town.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Flambeau is stunned to find his estranged father at St Mary's, who has a dangerous mission in mind. Flambeau is summoned to St Mary's by a funeral announcement for his father.

programme.title: Qi
programme.desc: Stephen Fry talks in Jargon to Victoria Coren Mitchell, Bill Bailey, Jimmy Carr and Alan Davies.

programme.title: Qi
programme.desc: Joining Stephen to talk all things Jam, Jelly and Juice are Jo Brand, Liza Tarbuck, Sue Perkins and Alan Davies.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Hosted by Rob Brydon, David Mitchell and Lee Mack lead two teams and try to hoodwink each other with absurd facts and plausible lies. This week's guests are Danny Dyer, Jon Richardson, Joe Lycett and Moira Stuart.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: It's the day of Kyle's swearing in ceremony for the cadets and he gets worried when Cain disppears.

programme.title: Coronation Street
